partner, letter, loi, mou, support, budget, cost, finance, eligible, match funding, co-investment

applications_reviewed.name: Scaling performance of quantum computing hardware: CR&D
applications_reviewed.gate: Quantum hardware lead, hardware access, consortium, budget and Project Impact evidence required.

applications_reviewed.name: ADOPT Facilitator Support Grant: Round 10
applications_reviewed.gate: England farming/growing/forestry applicant and registered Project Facilitator evidence required.

applications_reviewed.name: DRIVE35 Innovation Fund: Collaborate 3
applications_reviewed.gate: Vehicle manufacturer or Tier 1 partner, SME claimant, match funding, late-stage R&D and budget evidence required.

applications_reviewed.name: DRIVE35: Scale Up Fund
applications_reviewed.gate: ZEV manufacturing facility, co-investment, eligible business lead, site and cost evidence required.

applications_reviewed.name: Full ADOPT Grant: Round 8
applications_reviewed.gate: England farming lead, UK farming collaborator, listed facilitator, site and budget evidence required.

applications_reviewed.name: ACTASAP Pilot Phase 1
applications_reviewed.gate: Academic lead, TTO or equivalent support, ACT idea ownership and eligible cost basis required.

applications_reviewed.name: Accelerated Knowledge Transfer Partnerships 6 (AKT 6)
applications_reviewed.gate: Knowledge Base lead, four-or-more-FTE business evidence, finance contribution and AKT Monitoring Officer invite evidence required.

applications_reviewed.name: Commercialising Knowledge Assets Fund (CKAF) Autumn
applications_reviewed.gate: Eligible public sector research organisation, Knowledge Asset ownership and senior support evidence required.

applications_reviewed.name: Zero Emission Vessels and Infrastructure 2: Energy Efficiency
Zero Emission Vessels and Infrastructure 2: Electric Power
Zero Emission Vessels and Infrastructure 2: Alternative Fuels
Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Pre-deployment trials
Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Feasibility studies
Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Deployment trials

classified_findings.assessment: Business accounts and cost workpapers exist locally, but they do not provide route-specific partner budgets, eligible-cost splits, match funding, co-investment, Swiss partner costs, maritime deployment budgets, or quantum hardware facility costs.
controls: Private bank transaction files were not copied or used as grant evidence by default.
No bank, tax, account, or password values are recorded in this index.

classified_findings.assessment: The matching files are Aureon-created request drafts and partner-targeting material. They are not signed partner commitments, Swiss implementation partner records, research institute commitments, waiver approvals, or partner budgets.
classified_findings.remaining_gate: Swiss implementation partner, research institute or waiver, signed commitment, partner budget, permit/export position, project finances.

classified_findings.assessment: A QUB outreach draft exists, but no QUB, Ulster, TTO, academic lead, knowledge-base agreement, or 4 FTE business eligibility evidence was identified from filenames.
classified_findings.remaining_gate: Knowledge-base lead, TTO approval, lead commitment, 4 FTE UK business evidence where required.

classified_findings.assessment: The matching maritime files are Aureon-created evidence request packs and unrelated research/report files. No external maritime lead, vessel, port, shipyard, trial-site, permit, safety-case, insurance, deployment budget, or three-year demonstration commitment was identified.
classified_findings.remaining_gate: Named maritime lead and asset/site/budget/permit evidence.

classified_findings.assessment: The matching files are abstracts and draft outreach. No vehicle manufacturer, Tier 1 supplier, ZEV manufacturing facility, match-funding, or co-investment commitment was identified.
classified_findings.remaining_gate: Eligible ZEV lead/partner, facility, match funding or co-investment evidence.

classified_findings.assessment: The matching files are Aureon-created draft outreach. No England farming, growing or forestry business lead evidence and no registered facilitator evidence was identified.
classified_findings.remaining_gate: Eligible England farm/growing/forestry lead plus facilitator evidence.

classified_findings.assessment: The matching files are Aureon-created drafts and audits. No eligible public-sector research organisation, PRSE lead, UKRI institute lead, or Knowledge Asset ownership evidence was identified.
classified_findings.remaining_gate: Eligible public-sector research organisation lead and knowledge-asset ownership evidence.

classified_findings.assessment: Aureon quantum and hardware research exists locally and can support narrative evidence. It is not evidence of an eligible quantum hardware lead, consortium, facility access, hardware test access, partner commitment, or eligible budget.
classified_findings.remaining_gate: Quantum hardware lead, facility/access, consortium and budget evidence.

controls: This is an internal Aureon index, not a funder attachment.
Filename matches are treated as leads for evidence review, not proof of eligibility.
No external portal, email, upload, partner invitation, award terms or final submission action was performed.
Private bank/tax/password data was not copied into this artifact.
No remaining IFS application was marked submit-ready from filename evidence alone.
